itinerary.title: Arrival in Kuala Lumpur and City Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Kuala Lumpur International Airport, transfer to your hotel and complete check-in. In the afternoon, visit the famous Petronas Twin Towers and stroll through KLCC Park. Spend your evening exploring the shopping and dining areas of Bukit Bintang.

itinerary.title: Kuala Lumpur Landmarks and Batu Caves Tour
itinerary.description: After breakfast, enjoy a city tour. Climb the colorful steps of the Batu Caves temple and visit the Royal Selangor Pewter Factory. Later, visit the Central Market and explore Chinatown before a free evening.

itinerary.title: Cameron Highlands Nature Excursion
itinerary.description: Take an early morning day trip to the cool hills of Cameron Highlands (approximately 3 hours away). Tour local tea plantations and visit strawberry farms. Enjoy a short nature hike or visit the scenic Mossy Forest before returning to Kuala Lumpur.

itinerary.title: Shopping and Kuala Lumpur Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy breakfast and check out of your hotel. Spend your final morning doing last-minute shopping before your private transfer to Kuala Lumpur International Airport for your departure flight.

title: Malaysia Explorer
description: Discover the modern city life, historic temples, and cool highlands of Malaysia on this 4-day tour. Perfect for travelers seeking a mix of city sightseeing and mountain nature trails.
highlights: Explore the Petronas Twin Towers and KLCC Park in Kuala Lumpur
Visit the historic Batu Caves and Royal Selangor Pewter Factory
Take a day excursion to the cool tea country of Cameron Highlands
Shop for local crafts at Central Market and Chinatown
